changeList: 2.1.222-1-e8078dc: PR #131 - Retry transient 5xx responses in Http.getWith429Retry (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/131) — ### Motivation - Reddit user JSON endpoints can intermittently return HTTP 500/5xx responses which previously caused immediate rip failure, so server-side transient errors should be retried similarly to 429 rate-limits.
